## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed

## Validation

- [ ] `uv run pytest`
- [ ] docs/examples updated if behavior changed

## Checklist

- [ ] scope is intentional and limited to this change
- [ ] tests updated when behavior changed
- [ ] README / templates / config docs updated when workflow changed
- [ ] no secrets or local-only paths introduced

## Notes

Add any reviewer context, follow-ups, or caveats here.
